
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{"products":[{},{},{}]},"pending":[{"id":"1","path":["products"]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"lead":{"__typename":"Employee","id":1,"derivedMood":"HAPPY"}},"id":"1","subPath":[0]}],"completed":[{"id":"1"}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
